title: News, Media & Opinion - Alex Baker MP | Aldershot
meta_description: Keep updated on the latest news, campaigns and our work on behalf of voters in the local area.

h3: A £20 million boost for Cherrywood

text_excerpt: News, Media & Opinion - Alex Baker MP | Aldershot >>>>>>>>> (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) >>>>>>>>> End (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) Find me on Facebook 020 7219 4085 Email Me HOME ABOUT NEWS CAMPAIGNS Aldershot and Farnborough Labour’s Missions COMMUNITY SURVEY HELP Contact Useful Links Visit Parliament Privacy Policy NEWS, MEDIA AND OPINION The latest news and views about my work for the residents of Aldershot and Farnborough. News ALEX BAKER MP’S SPEECH TO PARLIAMENT DURING THE NORTHERN IRELAND TROUBLES BILL CARRY OVER MOTION For months I have been meeting with veterans, pressing Government Ministers, and written directly to the Secretary of State. My message has been clear: we need stronger protections for our veterans in the Northern Ireland Troubles Bill. Read More » Alex Baker MP 28/04/2026 News A £20 million boost for Cherrywood Working together, Alex Baker MP and Rushmoor Borough Council have secured £20 million to invest in the Cherrywood community through Labour’s ‘Pride in Place’ programme. Read More » Alex Baker MP 22/03/2026 News 100 Days to Go: Armed Forces Day is coming home to Aldershot Hundreds of schoolchildren joined service personnel to start the 100 day countdown to the national Armed Forces Day celebrations in Aldershot yesterday Read More » Alex Baker MP 20/03/2026 News New Farnborough Leisure Centre plans get the green light An exciting new leisure centre in Farnborough was given the go-ahead on Wednesday night in what campaigners have hailed as a ‘major victory for local families’. Read More » Alex Baker MP 13/03/2026 News Supporting our Armed Forces and their families in times of crisis There is a sizeable number of civilians and service families with local connections in the Middle East or with loved ones there. They are facing an incredibly challenging and dangerous time and I have been working very hard with my Parliamentary colleagues to make sure everyone is safe. Read More » Alex Baker MP 11/03/2026 News Sink holes, potholes and gaps in accountability Residents are rightly asking when lasting repairs to our roads will be delivered. I have met the Conservative-run County Council to press for clear timelines, transparent communication and a firm plan for permanent repairs, particularly in areas residents have repeatedly flagged with me. Read More » Alex Baker MP 26/02/2026 Load More FOLLOW ON SOCIAL MEDIA Comments Box SVG icons Used for the like, share, comment, and reaction icons Alex Baker MP Play The Renter's Rights Bill comes in to force today, making housing fairer for over 20,000 renters across Rushmoor. But laws are only effective when they're enforced locally. That's why, working with our Labour councillors, we are: ✅ Ending no-fault evictions for good. ✅ Holding landlords accountable for housing quality. ✅ Taking direct enforcement action where standards aren’t met. Made possible by a Labour council, working with a Labour MP and Government, to deliver real fairer housing standards for renters. #farnborough #aldershot #Rushmoorsontrack #rushmoorlabour ...
